outcome_record.event_name: UCL Round of 16 Leg 1 — Manchester City vs Real Madrid

prediction.pre_match_note: UCL R16 Leg 1. Two-legged tie: tactical draw premium applied (Leg 1 protocol from recalibration-v3). But Real Madrid quality edge + Vinicius Jr ATM × 1.12 + Mbappé away day form → AWAY favoured despite draw premium. SMS 74.

calibration_flags.notes: WRONG DIRECTION — Draw. Two-legged Leg 1 draw premium from recalibration-v3 was the correct instinct but we overrode it with AWAY prediction. LEARNING: When recalibration-v3 two-legged Leg 1 protocol says DRAW_LIKELY, do not override with directional prediction even when one team appears stronger. The tactical draw is structural in European away-leg dynamics.
